title: Chloe's Animal Snack Time
synopsis: Join Chloe as she shares yummy snacks with her animal friends in this delightful tale of friendship and food.

pages.text: Chloe has yummy snacks! She sits under the big apple tree with her basket full of treats.

illustration.description: A cheerful girl with short wavy strawberry-blonde hair, light skin, blue-gray eyes sitting under a magical apple tree with glowing red apples, holding a wicker basket overflowing with colorful snacks including bananas, crackers, and cheese, with sparkles and steam rising from the delicious food
illustration.alt: Chloe sitting under an apple tree with a basket of snacks

pages.text: A fluffy bunny hops over. 'Can I have a carrot?' asks Bunny. Chloe shares her orange carrots. Crunch, crunch!

illustration.description: A girl with short wavy strawberry-blonde hair, light skin, blue-gray eyes offering bright orange carrots with exaggerated sparkles to a white fluffy bunny with big eyes, steam and magical glimmers around the carrots showing how fresh and delicious they are
illustration.alt: Chloe sharing carrots with a bunny

pages.text: A brown bear waddles up. 'Honey, please!' says Bear. Chloe gives Bear golden honey that drips and shines.

illustration.description: A girl with short wavy strawberry-blonde hair, light skin, blue-gray eyes holding a jar of golden honey with magical drips and sparkles flowing down, offering it to a friendly brown bear with a big smile, honey glowing with warm light
illustration.alt: Chloe sharing honey with a bear

pages.text: A red bird flies down. 'Seeds for me!' chirps Bird. Chloe sprinkles tiny seeds that shimmer in the sun.

illustration.description: A girl with short wavy strawberry-blonde hair, light skin, blue-gray eyes sprinkling magical glittering seeds from her palm to a bright red bird perched on her finger, the seeds catching sunlight with sparkles and creating a feast celebration atmosphere
illustration.alt: Chloe feeding seeds to a bird

pages.text: All the animals are happy! Chloe claps her hands. Sharing food with friends makes snack time the best time!

illustration.description: A joyful girl with short wavy strawberry-blonde hair, light skin, blue-gray eyes clapping her hands while surrounded by the bunny, bear, and bird, all eating their magical sparkling foods with steam and glimmers, creating a feast celebration scene full of food joy
illustration.alt: Chloe celebrating with all her animal friends

metadata.illustrationStyle: delicious appetizing food, exaggerated proportions, steam drips sparkles, magical food, diverse cuisines, feast celebration, cooking scenes, yummy visual, food joy

questions.question: What does the bunny want to eat?
questions.explanation: The bunny asks for and receives carrots from Chloe.

questions.question: What does the bear like?
questions.explanation: The bear asks for honey and Chloe shares her golden honey.

questions.question: Where does Chloe sit?
questions.explanation: Chloe sits under the big apple tree with her snacks.
